rationale: The user explicitly requested medium intensity. Even under auto-analysis, this content would resolve to medium based on the following dimensions: (1) moderate content volume (~600 Chinese characters, ~20 atomic claims); (2) multiple institutional attributions involving historical figures and classical texts (Shuowen Jiezi, Shijing, Emperor Wu of Han, Huo Qubing); (3) no statistical claims; (4) affected groups include women as a demographic group and historical entertainer communities — moderate polarization potential; (5) domain sensitivity is moderate — the topic intersects gender studies, Chinese philology, and cultural history but is not a high-risk political or safety domain; (6) 10 emotional hooks identified, indicating deliberate rhetorical framing; (7) 8 unknowns requiring verification of classical Chinese textual claims. This yields 2-3 high-complexity dimensions (institutional attributions, affected groups with gender-polarization axis, multiple unknowns requiring domain expertise), which falls squarely in the medium band.
